testcase.name: test_swr_curve_center_matches_matched_swr

failure.message: AssertionError: SWR curve min (1.66) differs from matched_swr (2.095) by 0.4350000000000003 assert 0.4350000000000003 <= 0.3

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_swr_curve_physics.py:215: in test_swr_curve_center_matches_matched_swr assert diff <= 0.3, \ E AssertionError: SWR curve min (1.66) differs from matched_swr (2.095) by 0.4350000000000003 E assert 0.4350000000000003 <= 0.3

testcase.name: test_thin_vs_thick_elements

failure.message: AssertionError: Thin q_ratio (1.0) should be > thick q_ratio (1.0) assert 1.0 > 1.0

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_swr_curve_physics.py:311: in test_thin_vs_thick_elements assert q_ratio_thin > q_ratio_thick, \ E AssertionError: Thin q_ratio (1.0) should be > thick q_ratio (1.0) E assert 1.0 > 1.0

testcase.name: test_gamma_fine_tune_returns_optimized_settings
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_swr_curve_physics.py:347: in test_gamma_fine_tune_returns_optimized_settings assert response.status_code == 200, f"gamma-fine-tune failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: gamma-fine-tune failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","elements"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"num_elements":3,"driven_length_in":199.0,"driven_dia_in":0.5,"frequency_mhz":27.185,"feedpoint_r":25.0,"element_resonant_freq_mhz":27.2,"current_bar_pos":13.0,"current_cap_pf":50.0,"rod_od":0.625,"tube_od":0.75,"tube_length":3.0,"rod_spacing":3.5},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
